parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
participant Index
participant "User\nController" as UserController
database Database

activate User
User -> Index : GET: /users/signup
activate Index
Index -> UserController : renderSignup()
activate UserController
UserController -> UserController : render(index)
UserController -> Index : display signup
deactivate UserController
Index -> Index : POST: /users/signup
Index -> UserController : async signup()
activate UserController
UserController -> Database : User.findOne(email)
activate Database

alt user not found
    Database -> UserController : return false
    deactivate Database
    alt accept
        UserController -> UserController : User.create()
        UserController -> Index : display home
    else refuse
        UserController -> Index : display home
    end
else user already exist
    UserController -> Index : show error
end
deactivate UserController
deactivate Index
deactivate User
@enduml
```
